title: We've Got Answers
subtitle: No silly questions here — ask us anything about going solar!

items.question: Where do you work?
items.answer: We're based in Dublin but we cover all of Ireland — from Dublin to Cork, Galway, Limerick, and everywhere in between. If you're not sure, just give us a shout and we'll let you know!

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: We're normally around 8am – 5pm, but we actually offer a 24-hour service if you need us. We're always just a phone call away.

items.question: Are you properly qualified?
items.answer: Absolutely! We are SEAI Approved Installers with over 20 years of experience. We hold all the necessary certifications and qualifications. You're in very safe hands.

items.question: Do you use sub-contractors?
items.answer: Nope, never! Every single person who works on your home is part of our own team. We believe in consistency and quality — and that means doing the job ourselves.

items.question: Do you guarantee your work?
items.answer: Of course! We offer a lifetime workmanship guarantee on everything we do. We stand behind our work 100%.

items.question: How will I know who's turning up at my house?
items.answer: Our team always arrive with ID badges, in clean uniform, and ready to go. If you're ever unsure, just call the office and we'll confirm who's on the way.

items.question: How much will I actually save?
items.answer: Most of our customers save around €2,000 a year on their energy bills — some even more! With a well-designed system, you could cut your bills by up to 70%. Not bad, right?

items.question: How long does it take to install?
items.answer: Most home installs are done in just 1-2 days. We turn up on time, keep everything spotless, and get you generating your own power before you know it.

items.question: What SEAI grants are available?
items.answer: The SEAI offers grants of up to €2,100 for solar PV panels and €600 for battery storage. We handle all the grant paperwork for you, making the process hassle-free.

items.question: Will solar panels work on my roof?
items.answer: Solar panels work on most roofs in Ireland! South-facing is ideal, but east and west-facing roofs also perform well. During our free site survey, we'll assess your roof and design the perfect system for your home.
